basic_details.job_title: Lansdowne Forest Division Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Lansdowne Forest Division Working Plan Associate Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. 128 / 19-1(2) on the official website www.forest.uk.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Lansdowne Forest Division Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in upper age limit for SC/ ST/ OBC/ Women candidates as per Uttarakhand State Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Sc in Botany/ Zoology/ Forestry/ Wildlife from a recognized University/ Institution with 1 Division (at least 60% Marks).
qualification.details: M. Sc in Botany/ Zoology/ Forestry/ Wildlife from a recognized University/ Institution with 1 Division (at least 60% Marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Lansdowne Forest Division Working Plan Associate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.forest.uk.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Working Plan Associate post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Working Plan Associate post is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Science (M. Sc) degree in Botany, Zoology, Forestry, or Wildlife from a recognized university with a first division (at least 60% marks).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Working Plan Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month for the Working Plan Associate post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Uttarakhand State Government rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Working Plan Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Working Plan Associate post will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Lansdowne Forest Division, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 128 / 19-1(2).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Forest Department of Uttarakhand, www.forest.uk.gov.in, or through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
